header.title: Playbooks
header.subtitle: Playbooks help companies onboard users to match your needs. Prescriptive yet custom to give you our guidance while recognizing this is not a one-size fits all solution.

who-to-onboard.title: Who would you like to onboard?
who-to-onboard.subtitle: This helps us better recommend which data to collect.

kyc.title: Onboard people
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.

kyb.title: Onboard businesses and their beneficial owners
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.

name-your-playbook.title: Name your playbook
name-your-playbook.subtitle: This helps you easily identify your Playbook, especially if you have multiple ones.

your-playbook.title: Your Playbook recommendation
your-playbook.subtitle: Here's our recommended Playbook configuration. Feel free to edit it to better suit your needs.

investor-profile.subtitle: If you're a brokerage company, for instance, you're required to ask investor profile questions.

selfie.warning: You can optionally request users to take a selfie to validate the ID document requested.

id-doc-first.checkbox: Use document scan to autofill basic identity data
id-doc-first.warning: Normally, users scan their documents after typing in their personal data. This configuration allows us to pre-fill the personal data based on OCRed information after they do the scan.

type-form.title: Types of onboarding configuration
type-form.description: Select the type of verification flow you want to create:

kyc.title: KYC
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.

kyb.title: KYB
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.

errors.required: Please enter a name for your onboarding configuration.

id-doc-form.alert-info: We might still need to ask some users to capture their ID document as part of our step-up verification flow.

selfie.label: Request a selfie
selfie.hint: You can optionally request users to take a selfie to validate the ID document requested.

regionality.title: Regionality
regionality.subtitle: Restrict acceptable IDs by country of issuance.

kyc-collect-form.description: Select types of documents to request.

ssn.title: SSN
ssn.request: Request users to provide their SSN

no-ssn.label: Allow users without an SSN to proceed with the verification
no-ssn.hint: They will need to be manually reviewed by you.

kyc-collect-form.nationality: Request users to specify their nationality

kyc-step-up.title: Step-up document request
kyc-step-up.description: When users cannot be identified with their submitted data, automatically requesting additional documentation can improve your onboarding process conversion. This has an additional cost per step-up request.

kyc-investor-profile.title: Investor profile questions
kyc-investor-profile.description: These are required for brokerage and investment apps, and are meant to understand users' risk tolerance and investment preferences.
kyc-investor-profile.label: Ask investor profile questions

kyc-access-form.title: Authorized scopes
kyc-access-form.description: Select the data attributes you need read access to after a user onboarding. During onboarding, the user will "authorize" access to the scopes you choose below. If you are not sure what you will need, leave all the default fields selected.

kyb-collect-form.title: KYB
kyb-collect-form.description: You can customize the verification flow by choosing optional fields to collect.
kyb-collect-form.beneficial-owner-warning: Only a beneficial owner can verify a business. A beneficial owner is anyone who owns at least 25% of the business.

kyb-bo-collect-form.title: KYC of a Beneficial owner
kyb-bo-collect-form.description: To successfully verify a business we also need to verify its beneficial owner's identity.
kyb-bo-collect-form.step-up-description: When users cannot be instantly verified with the data they submitted, you can request them to submit extra documentation. This step up improves the conversion rate of your onboarding process and has an extra cost per request.

kyb-access-form.title: Authorized scopes
kyb-access-form.description: Select the data attributes you need read access to after an onboarding. During onboarding, the user will "authorize" access to the scopes you choose below. If you are not sure what you will need, leave all the default fields selected.
